title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that despite US dominance in chips and models, China holds a critical advantage in power infrastructure for AI data centers. The fragmentation of US governance across federal, state, and local jurisdictions constrains grid capacity, while China's centralized NDRC and NEA coordination plus 25,000+ miles of ultra-high voltage lines enable rapid data center scaling. Tech companies like Google, Meta, and OpenAI are forced into workarounds such as behind-the-meter generation and off-grid plants, particularly in Texas.
